title: Internal Security Policy - Password Rotation Requirements
body:
TECHJORPN INTERNAL SECURITY POLICY
Policy Document: ISP-2026-001 (Annual Update)
Effective Date: March 2026
Document Type: Internal_Policy
Scope: Security

**PURPOSE**
This policy establishes and maintains security standards for password management across TechCorp, including requirements for password rotation frequency, strength, and protection.

**BACKGROUND**
Following the annual security audit recommendations dated 2026, TechCorp is updating the password rotation requirement to strengthen protection against credential-based threats while balancing operational efficiency and user compliance.

**POLICY STATEMENT**

All employees, contractors, and personnel with access to TechCorp systems must comply with the following password security requirements:

1. PASSWORD ROTATION FREQUENCY
   a. All user account passwords must be rotated every 60 days
   b. Privileged/administrative account passwords must be rotated every 30 days
   c. Service account passwords must be rotated on a schedule determined by system risk assessment
   d. Passwords must be changed immediately upon suspicion of compromise

2. PASSWORD STRENGTH REQUIREMENTS
   a. Minimum length: 12 characters
   b. Must include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters
   c. Cannot reuse any of the last 10 passwords
   d. Must not match company directory names, common words, or dictionary terms

3. PASSWORD PROTECTION AND STORAGE
   a. Passwords must never be shared with anyone, including IT personnel
   b. Passwords must not be transmitted via email or other unsecured communication
   c. Passwords must not be written down or stored in unencrypted formats
   d. Use of approved password managers is strongly encouraged
   e. Multi-factor authentication (MFA) must be enabled where available

4. PROHIBITED PRACTICES
   a. Using the same password across multiple systems or personal accounts
   b. Reusing variations of previous passwords
   c. Storing passwords in browser caches or autofill features without e
